untranslatable_reason: Signal requires fundamental data (quarterly EPS, prior year EPS, 5-year CAGR, annual earnings history) which are not available in the allowed technical indicators list. The allowed indicators are limited to price action, moving averages, RSI, ATR, Bollinger Bands, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Donchian, Pivots, Volume ratios, and Bar properties. No earnings data, EPS metrics, or year-over-year comparisons are available.
translation_notes: SCHWAGER_DRY_0_0 is a fundamental/earnings-based signal that cannot be translated to technical indicators. Requires: (1) Current quarter EPS > prior year quarter EPS by 50%, (2) 5-year annual CAGR >= 24%, (3) Last 3 years each show YoY earnings increases. These conditions require access to earnings databases and fundamental data streams, not technical price/volume indicators.
